entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00314) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: DVM BACKPLANE TRAY ASSY, NO WARRANTY; DUAL VEHICLE MOUNT (DVM) ADAPTER ASSEMBLY. DOES NOT INCLUDE WARRANTY.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00315) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADD FOLLOWING EQUIPMENT TO CHS CONTRACT- V1 LATITUDE E6440 LAPTOP, V1 320GB SERIAL ATA HARD DRIVE FOR DELL LATITUDE E6440 LAPTOP (342-3146 OR EQUIVALENT; QTY 5). INCLUDES OEM WARRANTY WITH RSC SUPPORT. V1 AVIZIA TACTICAL PORTABLE KIT FEATURES HIGH IMPACT PLASTIC CASE WITH 17.5 IN SCREEN FULLY READABLE IN SUNLIGHT, HD CAMERA, SUPPORTS H.323 AND SESSION INITIATION PROTOCOL (SIP) DUAL STREAM UP TO 6 MBPS, POWER CORD US 1.8M BLACK YP-12 TO YC-12 (PWR-CORD-US-A). CHS-4 5 YEAR WARRANTY V1 AVIZIA TACTICAL PORTABLE KIT FEATURES HIGH IMPACT PLASTIC CASE WITH 17.5 IN SCREEN FULLY READABLE IN SUNLIGHT, HD CAMERA, SUPPORTS H.323 AND SESSION INITIATION PROTOCOL (SIP) DUAL STREAM UP TO 6 MBPS, POWER CORD US 1.8M BLACK YP-12 TO YC-12 (PWR-CORD-US-A). - OEM WARRANTY (RSC SUPPORT INCLUDED) V1 CISCO 2951/K9 ROUTER WITH: CISCO 2951 W/3 GE 4 EHQIC 3 DSP 2 SM 256MB CF 512MB DRAM IPB (CISCO2951/K9), AC POWER CORD (NA) C13 NEMA 5-15P 2.1M, CISCO CONFIG PRO EXPRESS ON ROUTER FLASH W/O DEFAULT CONFIG, SECURITY LICENSE, UNIFIED COMM LICENSE, 3DES/SES/SUITE-B VPN ENCRYPTION MODULE, EIGHT PORT 10/100/1000 ETHERNET SWITCH INTERFACE CARD WITH POE, 192 CHANNEL HIGH DENSITY VOICE AND VIDEO DSP MODULE. INCLUDES CHS-4 5-YEAR WARRANTY. V1 CISCO 2951/K9 ROUTER WITH: CISCO 2951 W/3 GE 4 EHQIC 3 DSP 2 SM 256MB CF 512MB DRAM IPB (CISCO2951/K9), AC POWER CORD (NA) C13 NEMA 5-15P 2.1M, CISCO CONFIG PRO EXPRESS ON ROUTER FLASH W/O DEFAULT CONFIG, SECURITY LICENSE, UNIFIED COMM LICENSE, 3DES/SES/SUITE-B VPN ENCRYPTION MODULE, EIGHT PORT 10/100/1000 ETHERNET SWITCH INTERFACE CARD WITH POE, 192 CHANNEL HIGH DENSITY VOICE AND VIDEO DSP MODULE. OEM WARRANTY (INCLUDES RSC SUPPORT, ESA APPLIES). V1 CISCO 5512 ASA WITH: NGFW ASA 5512-X W/ SW 6GE DATA 1GE MGMT AC 3DES/AES SSD 120G, POWER CABLE(CAB-AC). CHS-4 5 YEAR WARRANTY. V1 CISCO 5512 ASA WITH: NGFW ASA 5512-X W/ SW 6GE DATA 1GE MGMT AC 3DES/AES SSD 120G, POWER CABLE(CAB-AC). OEM WARRANTY (RSC SUPPORT INCLUDED, ESA APPLIES). V1 CISCO 3560X 48 PORT POE IP BASE SWITCH WITH: AC POWER CORD (CAB-3KX-AC). INCLUDES CHS-4 5 YEAR WARRANTY. V1 CISCO 3560X 48 PORT POE IP BASE SWITCH WITH: AC POWER CORD (CAB-3KX-AC). OEM WARRANTY (RSC SUPPORT INCLUDED, ESA APPLIES). V1 LATITUDE E6540 NOTEBOOK COMPUTER LAPTOP WITH SMARTCARD READER ONLY PALMREST, 3.0GHZ INTEL CORE I7-4610M, 15.6 HD ANTI-GLARE LED, 8GB (2X4GB) RAM, 256GB SELF ENCRYPTING SSD MINI CARD OPAL STD COMPLIANT, AMD RADEON HD 8790M GRAPHICS 2GB GRAPHICS GDDR5 WITH EXPRESS CARD,DVD +/- RW DRIVE, ULTIMATE-N 6300 802.11N3X3 MINI CARD, WINDOWS 7 PRO 64-BIT, NO MEDIA, 9-CELL BATTERY, 130W AC POWER ADAPTER. INCLUDES CHS-4 5-YEAR WARRANTY V1 LATITUDE E6540 NOTEBOOK COMPUTER LAPTOP WITH SMARTCARD READER ONLY PALMREST, 3.0GHZ INTEL CORE I7-4610M, 15.6 HD ANTI-GLARE LED, 8GB (2X4GB) RAM, 256GB SELF ENCRYPTING SSD MINI CARD OPAL STD COMPLIANT, AMD RADEON HD 8790M GRAPHICS 2GB GRAPHICS GDDR5 WITH EXPRESS CARD, DVD +/- RW DRIVE, ULTIMATE-N 6300 802.11N3X3 MINI CARD, WINDOWS 7 PRO 64-BIT, NO MEDIA, 9-CELL BATTERY, 130W AC POWER ADAPTER. INCLUDES OEM WARRANTY WITH RSC SUPPORT. V1 LATITUDE 14 RUGGED EXTREME LAPTOP WITH INTEGRATED EXPRESSCARD READER, 1.70GHZ INTEL CORE I7-4650U, 14 DISPLAY TOUCHSCREEN, WEBCAM WITH PRIVACY SHUTTER AND MIC, 16GB (2X8GB) RAM, 512GB SOLID STATE HARD DRIVE, NVIDIA GEFORCE GT 720M 2GB GRAPHICS, DUAL BAND WIRELESS AC 7260 802.11 AC/A/B/G/N 2X2 BLUETOOTH 4.0 LE HALF MINI CARD, TRAY LOAD DVD DRIVE, WINDOWS 7 PRO 64-BIT, NO MEDIA, 9-CELL BATTERY, 90W AC POWER ADAPTER. DOCKING STATION FOR THE DELL LATITUDE 14 RUGGED EXTREME LAPTOP AND 90W POWER SUPPLY FOR DELL DOCKING STATION. DELL RUGGED EXTREME14 E5 90W AC ADAPTER (US), QTY 2. (OEM A450-AAYQ) INCLUDES OEM WARRANTY ONLY (RSC SUPPORT NOT INCLUDED)

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00322) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD: LS-671 POWERED LOUDSPEAKER FOR VIPER; H-250 HANDSET FOR VIPER; RF JUMPER CABLE TO VIPER RADIO; GROUND STRAP FOR VIPER; POWER CABLE ASSEMBLY FOR VIPER; RF CABLE, 20' LMR400UF, BNCM-NM; RF CABLE, 20' LMR400UF, NM-NM; LS-671 AUDIO CABLE; VIPER VEHICLE ADAPTER AMPLIFIER, UHF L?BAND WITH RF JUMPER CABLE; VIPER VEHICLE INSTALLATION KIT, HMMWV; VIPER MOUNTING PLATE ASSEMBLY, MRAP; VIPER INSTALLATION KIT ASSEMBLY. INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING: - VIPER VEHICLE INSTALLATION KIT, HMMWV (1100732-501) - RF CABLE, 20' LMR400UF, BNCM-NM (XR00001974) - RF CABLE, 20' LMR400UF, NM-NM (XR00001739) - TRI BAND VEHICULAR ANTENNA (85-P53669U001) - LS-671 AUDIO CABLE (CA3674-6) - LS-671 POWERED LOUDSPEAKER (LS-671/VRC) - H-250 HANDSET (HE-250-229) - OEM WARRANTY ONLY (RSC SUPPORT NOT INCLUDED); AND SCREW AND CLAMP KIT FOR VIPER VEHICLE IK. INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING: - CLAMP (2401786-1) - SPACER, TOE-CLAMP (2401810-1) - SUPPORT REAR (3101225-501) - SCREW PNH X REC M8 X 1.25 X 35MM L 18-8 SS (79346-001, QTY 2) - SCREW PNH X REC 10-32 X 0.625 SS (MS51958-65, QTY 2) - OEM WARRANTY ONLY (RSC SUPPORT NOT INCLUDED)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
